notes: Theme readability overhaul: danger/911 colours now derive from each theme's --destructive token (no more unreadable red-on-dark), new --info/--success/--warning semantic tokens + a single-source design-token migration across all 15 themes so nothing renders light-box-on-dark anymore. Live Contrast Check tool in Settings. New 'Pink Goes Good With Green' (Wicked) theme with a Glinda-to-Elphaba sidebar. The Accessibility theme is now 'Follow System' - it respects your OS high-contrast settings (Windows/macOS) instead of a fixed palette, far better for low-vision users. Analytics rebuilt client-side with trigger->outcome correlations across most trackers, plus diabetes time-in-range / glucose trends. Collapsible Settings, slimmer mobile scrollbar, fixed text-size scaling, Live Simple font.
